name: APU - Analisis de Precios Unitarios
standard: Reglamento de la LOPSRM (integration of precios unitarios)
description: Unit-price (precio unitario) integration the Mexican way: a costo directo (mano de obra, materiales, maquinaria y herramienta) carries indirectos, financiamiento, utilidad and cargos adicionales in turn, with IVA added to the estimate total. The oe_mexico_pack module integrates a unit price through these steps, and the APU completeness rule checks that a costed concept declares its costo-directo components.
